title: Nursery Rhyme. CLV. Songs.
content:
Jacky, come give me thy fiddle,
            If ever thou mean to thrive:
        Nay; I'll not give my fiddle
            To any man alive.

        If I should give my fiddle,
            They'll think that I'm gone mad;
        For many a joyful day
            My fiddle and I have had.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLV. Songs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
